isActive.description: Defines if the account is active (`true`) or not (`false`).

isOperating.description: Defines if the account is in production (`true`) or not (`false`).

district.description: Neighborhood of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

country.description: Country of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

complement.description: Additional address of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

haveParentAccount.description: Defines if the account has a parent account (`true`) or not (`false`).

city.description: City of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

address.description: Address of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

hasLogo.description: Defines if the store's logotype has been uploaded (`true`) or not (`false`).

number.description: Number of the address of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

postalCode.description: Zip code of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

state.description: State or province of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

telephone.description: Telephone number of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

sponsor.description: Object with information about the sponsor user.

contact.description: Information about the person assigned as main contact of the store.

name.description: Name of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

email.description: Email of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

phone.description: Telephone number of the person assigned as main contact of the store.

operationDate.description: Date when the account went into production.

inactivationDate.description: Date when the account was deactivated.

creationDate.description: Date when the account was created.

sites.description: Array of objects representing each store.

appKey.description: Deprecated. Check the `appKeys` object for all appKeys.
